title: ocimum carnosum
intro: Ocimum carnosum, also known as Mexican basil or bush basil, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular choice for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ocimum carnosum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and muscle pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. Ocimum carnosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
